lightHit: You hear that? That's the sound of everyone agreeing with me!
Even the back row felt that one!
heavyHit: That wasn't me — that was the will of the crowd coming through!
combo: First they laughed, then they cheered, now they're chanting — because {stanceAgainst}, and deep down you know it too!
Point after point after point — the momentum is a landslide and you are standing under it!
special: RALLY THE CROWD! On your feet! {topic}? The people have ALREADY decided!
Listen to them roar! You're not arguing with me anymore — you're arguing with everyone!
whiff: The crowd gasps! They love a comeback story!
blocked: Boo all you want, it still rattled you!
You can block the words but not the movement!
counter: HA! {opponent} stumbles, and the crowd? The crowd never forgets!
You handed me that one, and I am REGIFTING IT LOUDER!
victory: The people have spoken on {topic} — and I merely gave them a microphone!
History will remember this argument! Briefly! But loudly!
defeat: The crowd... turned? THE CROWD TURNED?!
This isn't a loss, it's — it's a silent majority! They're just very silent!

special: RALLY THE CROWD! This is a STADIUM question — {topic} — and the stadium is CHANTING MY NAME!
